globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://www.google.com/maps/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src https://www.google.com/maps/
